title: Zeka grass
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Zeka grass''' was a type of spotted [[Grass/Legends|grass]] that grew on the plains of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. It was eaten by [[suubatar]]s.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
